metadata.description: Official Corezoid AI plugin for Claude Code. Provides BPM process skills, MCP tools, docs, schemas, and samples for working with Corezoid processes.

plugins.name: corezoid
plugins.description: Corezoid BPM platform skills, MCP server, docs, and samples for Claude Code.

plugins.name: simulator
plugins.description: Simulator.Company platform assistant. Exposes the Simulator REST API as an MCP server and provides skills for managing actors, forms, graph structures, and financial accounts.
